summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Onspotly landing page - iteration 7. All new features verified working: Before/After headers centered, email changed to support@onspotlyapp.com everywhere, Legal section has Terms+Privacy links, iPhone 17 series in dropdown, EST timezone, waitlist counter removed, mobile responsiveness verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ - returns Onspotly API message (200)
Backend: POST /api/waitlist - creates entry with name, email, city (200)
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/count - returns count (200)
Backend: POST /api/shooter-apply - with city and device_type fields (200)
Backend: Validation rejects missing city/device_type (422)
Backend: iPhone 17 series accepted in device_type (iPhone 17, 17 Air, 17 Pro, 17 Pro Max)
Backend: All experience_years values accepted (0-1, 1-3, 3-5, 5+)
Backend: Timestamp uses EST timezone (-05:00 offset)
Frontend /features: Before Onspotly header centered with flex justify-center
Frontend /features: After Onspotly header centered with flex justify-center
Frontend /features: Grid container has max-w-4xl mx-auto for centering
Frontend footer: Terms of Service link present in Legal section
Frontend footer: Privacy Policy link present in Legal section
Frontend footer: Contact email is support@onspotlyapp.com
Frontend /terms: Email is support@onspotlyapp.com
Frontend /privacy: Email is support@onspotlyapp.com
Frontend /become-shooter: iPhone 17 in device dropdown
Frontend /become-shooter: iPhone 17 Air in device dropdown
Frontend /become-shooter: iPhone 17 Pro in device dropdown
Frontend /become-shooter: iPhone 17 Pro Max in device dropdown
Frontend /become-shooter: Terms checkbox validation - shows toast error if not checked
Frontend /join: NO waitlist counter shown (counter removed)
Frontend /join: Terms checkbox validation working
Frontend /join: Animated 'Thank You for Joining Onspotly!' message after submit
Frontend /random-page: 404 page displays correctly with '404', 'Page Not Found', 'Back to Home'
Mobile (390x844) /: Homepage hero renders correctly
Mobile (390x844) /become-shooter: Form fits screen width (342px < 390px)
Mobile (390x844) /join: Waitlist form renders correctly
Mobile (390x844) /features: Page renders correctly with stacked Before/After headers
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix in MongoDB during pytest runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All changes verified working: 1) Features page Before/After headers now centered with mx-auto and flex justify-center, 2) Email changed from hello@ to support@onspotlyapp.com across footer, terms, privacy pages, 3) Footer Legal section has both Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links, 4) iPhone 17 series (17, 17 Air, 17 Pro, 17 Pro Max) added to device dropdown in BecomeShooter form, 5) EST timezone configured with timedelta(hours=-5), timestamp shows -05:00 offset, 6) Waitlist counter completely removed from /join page, 7) Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844 for homepage, become-shooter, join, and features pages.
